string.text: Meet with Sidorovich
Sidorovich is a key figure for stalkers in the Zone.
Meet with Dushman
Dushman is a key figure for mercenaries in the Zone.
Meet with Major Hernandez
Major Hernandez is a key figure for the ISG in the Zone.
Stash
Marker for a stash from the drone.
Stash
Marker for a stash from the drone.
Stash
Marker for a stash from the drone.
Agroprom Research Institute Underground
You need to explore the Agroprom Research Institute underground. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Laboratory X-8
You need to explore Laboratory X-8. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Laboratory X-2
You need to explore Laboratory X-2. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Laboratory X-3
You need to explore Laboratory X-3. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Laboratory X-6
You need to explore Laboratory X-6. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Hospital Underground
You need to explore the Hospital underground. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Bunker A-1
You need to explore Bunker A-1. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Dead City Underground
You need to explore the Dead City underground. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Scientific Station Underground
You need to explore the Scientific Station underground. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Collider
You need to explore the Collider. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Laboratory in Kasyany
You need to explore the Laboratory in Kasyany. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Underground of the Anomalous Fields
You need to explore the underground of the Anomalous Fields. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Quiet Hills Underground
You need to explore the Quiet Hills underground. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Uncharted Lands Underground
You need to explore the Uncharted Lands underground. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Laboratory X-27
You need to explore Laboratory X-27. There might still be some interesting documents there. (5 documents).
Laboratory X-11
You need to explore Laboratory X-11. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Laboratory X-15
You need to explore Laboratory X-15. There might still be some interesting documents there.
Zombie Clearing at the Sawmill
Beard gave a task to clear out the zombies located at the sawmill.
Bandit Clearing
Beard gave a task to clear out the bandits located on the Old Road.
Monolith Clearing
Beard gave a task to clear out the Monolith forces located on the Old Road.
“Spectrum” Base Clearing
Beard gave a task to clear out the “Spectrum” base located in Kurchatov-37.
“Sin” Base Clearing
Beard gave a task to clear out the “Sin” base located in the Cursed Forest.
Unique Weapon: Bring Denis Six Types of Materials

To craft a unique weapon, you need to gather expendable electrical materials. Bring Denis ten Fastening Parts, five pieces of Scrap Metal, three Coils of Copper Wire, a Box of Capacitors, a Box of Resistors, and a Box of Transistors.
